_spec.purpose: Variety-engine ledger. The directors room MUST read this before choosing a visual system and MUST append after delivery. Divergence rules (hard constraints): hero_structure must differ from the last 4 entries; atmosphere from the last 3; continuity_device from the last 2; hook_archetype from the last 3; palette_family from the last 3; type_pairing from the last 2. Novel techniques not in the library are encouraged — name them NEW:<name> and add them to TECHNIQUE_LIBRARY.md.

entry_schema.hero_structure: technique name/number driving the deck's signature look
entry_schema.hook_archetype: e.g. big-number, named-tension, question-map, before-after, quote
entry_schema.palette_family: e.g. arctic-teal, amber-sodium, roe-orange, ice-mint, violet-dusk
entry_schema.type_pairing: display + support families and axes used
entry_schema.narrative_structure: e.g. escalation, tour, argument, timeline, anatomy, versus
